title: bartlettina cleefii
intro: Bartlettina cleefii, a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, is native to Costa Rica. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which are derived from its leaves and flowers. These compounds have been shown to provide various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
